item.title: MACE-MP-0 (Cambridge)
item.description: Parameters: 0.00469B License: open Type: model "Uses 4-body equivariant messages; covers 89 elements; supports fine-tuning for ab initio accuracy with minimal data."

item.title: Unified-IO 2 (Allen AI)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model 600TB dataset (plus 120+ fine-tuning datasets) includes '1B imagetext pairs, 1T text tokens, 180M video clips, 130M interleaved image & text, 3M 3D assets, and 1M agent trajectories.'

item.title: WaveCoder-DS-6.7B (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 6.7B License: closed Type: model To obtain WaveCoder models, We choose StarCoder-15B, CodeLLaMa (7B and 13B), DeepseekCoder-6.7B as the base model and fine-tune all the base model for 3 epochs

item.title: YunShan (Huawei)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: closed Type: model Finance + law fine-tune of PanGu-π

item.title: PanGu-Pi (Huawei)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: closed Type: model Dense, named PanGu-π

item.title: YAYI 2 (Wenge)
item.description: Parameters: 30B License: open Type: model Dataset=240TB filtered to 10.6TB for 2.65T tokens

item.title: Emu2 (BAAI)
item.description: Parameters: 37B License: open Type: model VLM. Gemini clone. Outperforms Flamingo 80B. The Pile for text, but only sampled 3.6B tokens (1.4% of the dataset).

item.title: MedLM (Google DeepMind)
item.description: License: partial Type: model Available to 'white-listed' orgs only.

item.title: SOLAR-10.7B (Upstage AI)
item.description: Parameters: 10.7B License: open Type: model South Korean. Llama-2 arch. SOTA for its size (Dec/2023).

item.title: DeciLM-7B (Deci)
item.description: Parameters: 7.04B License: open Type: model 4.4x times faster than Mistral. English only.

item.title: Mistral-medium (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: 180B License: open Type: model MMLU=75.3% (GPT-3.5-turbo 20B=70%, Llama 2 70B=68.9%)

item.title: mixtral-8x7b-32kseqlen (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: 46.7B License: open Type: model MoE=7Bx8, aka mistral-small. 'Concretely, Mixtral has 45B total parameters but only uses 12B parameters per token. It, therefore, processes input and generates output at the same speed and for the same cost as a 12B model.'

item.title: StripedHyena 7B (Together)
item.description: Parameters: 7.65B License: open Type: model RedPajama (C4), new arch beyond just Transformers

item.title: NexusRaven-V2 13B (Nexusflow.ai)
item.description: License: open Type: model Based on CodeLlama. 'surpasses GPT-4 by up to 7% in function calling success rates in human-generated use cases involving nested and composite functions.'

item.title: Gemini Ultra 1.0 (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 1500B License: open Type: model Original MMLU=83.7. MMLU=90.04 with prompting. Chinchilla (20:1), dense, maybe 600B-2000T. Note: Gemini outputs are watermarked. I do not use GDM models. https://lifearchitect.ai/watermarking/

item.title: Mamba (CMU)
item.description: Parameters: 2.8B License: open Type: model The Pile, new arch beyond just Transformers. 2.7B MMLU=26.2. 7B MMLU=33.3.

item.title: LVM-3B (Berkeley/JHU)
item.description: Parameters: 3B License: closed Type: model Paper is 25MB. First Large Vision Model (LVM); no text. Based on Llama and LAION 5B (1.49B).

item.title: SeaLLM-13b (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 13B License: open Type: model Llama 2 for Southeast Asian (SEA) languages: Vietnamese 🇻🇳, Indonesian 🇮🇩, Thai 🇹🇭, Malay 🇲🇾, Khmer🇰🇭, Lao🇱🇦, Tagalog🇵🇭 and Burmese🇲🇲

item.title: pplx-70b-online (Perplexity)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: open Type: model Web access. Higher 'freshness' and 'truth' scores.

item.title: SeamlessM4T-Large v2 (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 2.3B License: open Type: model Based on NLLB and older models. https://github.com/facebookresearch/seamless_communication

item.title: Q-Transformer (Google DeepMind)
item.description: License: closed Type: model Robotics, builds on RT-1

item.title: Yuan 2.0 (IEIT)
item.description: Parameters: 102.6B License: open Type: model Chinese + EN dataset include The Pile: DM, arxiv, wikipedia, book3, stack exchange, Freelaw and medical

item.title: MEDITRON (EPFL)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: open Type: model Llama 2 trained on med data using NVIDIA Megatron-LM. "outperforms Llama-2-70B, GPT-3.5 (text-davinci-003, 8-shot), and Flan-PaLM on multiple medical reasoning tasks."

item.title: Transformers-Arithmetic (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 0.1B License: closed Type: model Proving maths is not memorized. Uses GPT-2-style model. Sébastien Bubeck

item.title: Starling-7B (Berkeley)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model Llama 2 7B -> OpenChat 7B -> Starling-7B (RLAIF)

item.title: Inflection-2 (Inflection AI)
item.description: Parameters: 1200B License: open Type: model “now the 2nd best LLM in the world”. Finished training 19/Nov/2023, waiting for fine-tuning and release.

item.title: Claude 2.1 (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: 130B License: open Type: model Less hallucinations, 200k context length, tool use

item.title: TÜLU 2 (Allen AI)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: open Type: model Llama 2 finetune with RLHF direct preference optimization (DPO).

item.title: Nemotron-3 22B (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: 22B License: open Type: model 8B released, 22B internal.

item.title: Nemotron-2 43B (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: 43B License: closed Type: model Used to train HelpSteer (16/Nov/2023): https://arxiv.org/abs/2311.09528

item.title: Orca 2 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 13B License: partial Type: model Llama 2 13B (2T) -> Orca 2 (GPT-4 finetune). Still an imitation model, overhyped: The False Promise of Imitating Proprietary LLMs https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.15717

item.title: Phi-2 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 2.7B License: open Type: model https://twitter.com/SebastienBubeck/status/1724854157004190095

item.title: Florence-2 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 0.771B License: open Type: model VLM, Flamingo alt

item.title: Mirasol3B (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 3B License: closed Type: model Combiner + autoregressive transformer for video/audio/text

item.title: OtterHD-8B (NTU)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: open Type: model Evolution of Persimmon-9.3B and Fuyu 8B

item.title: Gauss (Samsung)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: partial Type: model Gauss Language specializing in generating texts, Gauss Code on software and code description and Gauss Image for image creation.

item.title: Grok-1 (xAI)
item.description: Parameters: 314B License: open Type: model Context window=8192. UI: https://twitter.com/TobyPhln/status/1721053802235621734

item.title: Grok-0 (xAI)
item.description: Parameters: 33B License: closed Type: model Announced Nov/2023, trained Jul/2023

item.title: Yi-34B (01-ai)
item.description: Parameters: 34.4B License: open Type: model Controversy about Llama 2 base. https://twitter.com/kaifulee/status/1724673131875377465 MMLU=76.3 (PaLM 2=78.3) Outperforms Llama 2. Chinese and English. https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2023-11-05/kai-fu-lee-s-open-source-01-ai-bests-llama-2-according-to-hugging-face

item.title: GPT-4 Turbo (OpenAI)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: open Type: model https://openai.com/blog/new-models-and-developer-products-announced-at-devday

item.title: MatFormer (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 0.85B License: open Type: model Matryoshka Transformer or MatFormer model architecture. 850M (696M / 620M / 582M). "850M decoder-only MatFormer language model (MatLM) allows us to extract multiple smaller models spanning from 582M to 850M parameters, each exhibiting better validation loss and one-shot downstream evaluations than independently trained counterparts."

item.title: Skywork-13B (Kunlun Tech)
item.description: Parameters: 13B License: open Type: model CN + EN.

item.title: Kimi Chat (Moonshot AI)
item.description: Parameters: 100B License: open Type: model Chinese. Long context. No paper.

item.title: jina-embeddings-v2 (Jina AI)
item.description: Parameters: 0.435B License: open Type: model Alternative to text-embedding-ada-002. Related v1 paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2307.11224

item.title: Fuyu (Adept)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: open Type: model VLM. 8B available under open licence, Medium size is closed

item.title: ERNIE 4.0 (Baidu)
item.description: Parameters: 1000B License: open Type: model Dense (confirmed). English-dubbed launch video (2h52m): https://twitter.com/i/broadcasts/1yNGaZaeallJj & https://youtu.be/wYozcsavRuM

item.title: Zephyr (Hugging Face H4)
item.description: Parameters: 7.3B License: open Type: model Mistral with 'aligned' data removed from dataset

item.title: PaLI-3 (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 5B License: closed Type: model VLM. Next iteration of PaLI via Pathways. https://lifearchitect.ai/pathways/

item.title: Retro 48B (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: 48B License: open Type: model the largest LLM pretrained with retrieval before instruction tuning.'

item.title: Ferret (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: 13B License: open Type: model Vicuna base, multimodal

item.title: Lemur (XLANG Lab)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: open Type: model https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.06830

item.title: AceGPT (KAUST/Shenzhen)
item.description: Parameters: 13B License: open Type: model Arabic. Llama 2 + RLAIF

item.title: Yasa-1 (Reka AI)
item.description: License: partial Type: model Multi-modal. No public arch info. Researchers from DeepMind, Google, Baidu and Meta building enterprise models

item.title: RT-X (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 55B License: open Type: model Robotics using UL2. 'RT-1 model trained using the robotic data mixture as RT-1-X, and the RT-2 model trained using the robotic data mixture as RT-2-X.'

item.title: MotionLM (Waymo)
item.description: Parameters: 0.09B License: closed Type: model LLM for autonomous vehicle forecasting. https://youtu.be/jrMMNmN21I8?t=1560

item.title: GAIA-1 (Wayve)
item.description: Parameters: 9B License: closed Type: model World model, generates video. Uses T5-large 770M for language + all vision parameters

item.title: Qwen (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 72B License: open Type: model Chinese. Full name is 'Tongyi Qianwen' 通义千问. 'Lags behind both GPT-3.5 and GPT-4'. Originally 7B/14B params Apr/2023

item.title: Llama 2 Long (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: closed Type: model Unreleased to date. Context window=32,768 tokens (compare to Llama 2=4096 tokens)

item.title: LeoLM (Hessian AI/LAION)
item.description: Parameters: 13B License: open Type: model Llama 2 'extended' and pretrained on 2000B Llama 2 tokens + 65B tokens of German

item.title: Mistral 7B (Mistral)
item.description: Parameters: 7.3B License: open Type: model Apache 2.0, Sliding Window Attention (SWA) to handle longer sequences at smaller cost

item.title: Kosmos-2.5 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 1.3B License: closed Type: model

item.title: Baichuan 2 (Baichuan)
item.description: Parameters: 13B License: open Type: model Great paper. Chinese-English bilingual dataset

item.title: BOLT2.5B (ThirdAI)
item.description: Parameters: 2.5B License: open Type: model CPU trained

item.title: DeciLM (Deci)
item.description: Parameters: 5.7B License: open Type: model Faster inference (4.8× throughput of Llama 2)

item.title: MoLM (IBM)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: open Type: model ModuleFormer is based on the Sparse Mixture of Experts (MoE).

item.title: NExT-GPT (Singapore)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model Multimodal. Vicuna 7B + other modalities

item.title: Phi-1.5 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 1.3B License: open Type: model Textbooks only. 30B-token dataset

item.title: UniLM (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: 0.034B License: open Type: model Apple's Transformer model for iOS 17 + macOS Sonoma. Announce is actually Jun/2023. GPT-2 base? 128 token context window

item.title: Persimmon-8B (Adept)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: open Type: model Open Apache license and publicly accessible weights.

item.title: FLM-101B (BAAI)
item.description: Parameters: 101B License: open Type: model Train for $100k compute budget (on a cluster of 24 DGX-A800 GPU 8×80G servers for 21 days)

item.title: Falcon 180B (TII)
item.description: Parameters: 180B License: open Type: model Major milestone for open source models (largest open dense model to date).

item.title: Hunyuan (Tencent)
item.description: Parameters: 100B License: open Type: model

item.title: phi-CTNL (Independent)
item.description: Parameters: 0.1B License: open Type: model Satire. MMLU=100. 'phi-CTNL (pronounced “fictional”) that achieves perfect results across diverse academic benchmarks'

item.title: Granite (IBM)
item.description: Parameters: 13B License: open Type: model Original trained on 1T tokens, update 15/Feb/2024 trained on 2.5T tokens: granite-13b-chat-v2 (v2.1.0). "At IBM, we curated 6.48TB of data to train our LLM Granite.13B. This was reduced to 2.07 TB after pre-processing, a 68% decrease."

item.title: Jais (Inception)
item.description: Parameters: 13B License: open Type: model Arabic, trained in Abu Dhabi, UAE using Cerebras.

item.title: Code Llama 34B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 34B License: open Type: model Outperforms GPT-3.5. Initial Llama 2 (2T tokens) trained on 500B tokens of code, 100B tokens of python

item.title: IDEFICS (Hugging Face)
item.description: Parameters: 80B License: open Type: model Clone of Flamingo using Llama-1 65B. Named after Asterix and Obelix's dog Idefix (Image-aware Decoder Enhanced à la Flamingo with Interleaved Cross-attentionS)

item.title: Raven (UI/NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: 11B License: closed Type: model RAG Atlas

item.title: DukunLM (AzaleAI)
item.description: Parameters: 13B License: open Type: model Indonesian fine-tune of WizardLM (which is a Llama fine-tune).

item.title: WizardLM (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: open Type: model Assume Llama-2 fine-tune. Outperforms text-davinci-003. May merge this entry with the Apr/2023 7B release

item.title: Platypus (Boston University)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: open Type: model Fine-tune of Llama 2, family includes merges with Beluga, Dolphin, and Camel fine-tunes.

item.title: Japanese StableLM Alpha 7B (Stability AI)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model Best-performing openly available language model for Japanese speakers.

item.title: Stable Code 3B (Stability AI)
item.description: Parameters: 2.7B License: open Type: model Context window=16,384. Trained on The Stack dataset.

item.title: Med-Flamingo (Stanford)
item.description: Parameters: 8.3B License: open Type: model Uses LAION OpenFlamingo 9B, based on LLaMA-7B text + 1.3B vision

item.title: Alfred-40B-0723 (LightOn)
item.description: Parameters: 40B License: open Type: model First finetuned version of Falcon with RLHF. Enterprise: https://www.lighton.ai/paradigm

item.title: LLaMA-2-7B-32K (Together)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model 32k context window instead of 4k (Llama 2)

item.title: Med-PaLM M (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 540B License: closed Type: model Uses PaLM 1. Already outperformed by Med-PaLM 2. Med-PaLM Multimodal (Med-PaLM M).

item.title: BTLM-3B-8K (Cerebras)
item.description: Parameters: 3B License: open Type: model Runs on devices with as little as 3GB of memory [iPhone, Macbook] when quantized to 4-bit

item.title: Stable Beluga 2 (Stability AI)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: open Type: model Fine-tuned Llama 2. Non-commercial use license. Codename was FreeWilly2

item.title: Stable Beluga 1 (Stability AI)
item.description: Parameters: 65B License: open Type: model Fine-tuned LLaMA-1. Non-commercial use license. Codename was FreeWilly1

item.title: Meta-Transformer (Shanghai AI Laboratory/CUHK)
item.description: Parameters: 2B License: open Type: model Proto-AGI. 12 modalities (text, image, point cloud, audio, video, infrared, hyperspectral, X-ray, time-series, tabular, Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU), and graph data).

item.title: Llama 2 (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: open Type: model Context window=4096. MMLU=68.9 (GPT-3.5=70.0, GPT-4=86.4)

item.title: WormGPT ((Undisclosed))
item.description: Parameters: 6B License: partial Type: model GPT-J (2021) finetune/module.

item.title: Claude 2 (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: 130B License: open Type: model More HHH, 200k context length

item.title: LongLLaMA (IDEAS/DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model 256k context length

item.title: xTrimoPGLM (Tsinghua)
item.description: Parameters: 100B License: closed Type: model Protein language model

item.title: XGen (Salesforce)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model 8K sequence length. Released under Apache-2.0.

item.title: Zhinao (Intellectual Brain) (360 cn)
item.description: Parameters: 100B License: open Type: model

item.title: Yasa (Reka AI)
item.description: License: partial Type: model No public arch info. Researchers from DeepMind, Google, Baidu and Meta building enterprise models

item.title: Kosmos-2 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 1.6B License: open Type: model Proto-AGI. Multimodal large language model (MLLM). a multimodal large language model with grounding capability built upon KOSMOS-1

item.title: AudioPaLM (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 340B License: closed Type: model a unified multimodal architecture that can process and generate text and speech with applications including speech recognition and speech-to-speech translation

item.title: Inflection-1 (Inflection AI)
item.description: Parameters: 120B License: open Type: model Comparable with benchmarking results from InternLM 104B, 1-2% better. ‘Inflection-1 was trained using thousands of NVIDIA H100 GPUs on a very large dataset.’

item.title: Phi-1 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 1.3B License: closed Type: model Code model. ‘breaking existing scaling laws by training a 1.3B-parameter model, which we call phi-1, for roughly 8 passes over 7B tokens (slightly over 50B total tokens seen) followed by finetuning on less than 200M tokens.’

item.title: InternLM (Shanghai AI Laboratory/SenseTime)
item.description: Parameters: 104B License: closed Type: model Outperforms ChatGPT, LLaMA on RACE-h, Chinese + English

item.title: BlenderBot 3x (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 175B License: open Type: model OPT-175B with new dialogue data

item.title: Orca (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 13B License: partial Type: model LLaMA -> Vicuna -> Orca (GPT-4 finetune). Still an imitation model, overhyped: The False Promise of Imitating Proprietary LLMs https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.15717

item.title: PassGPT (ETH Zürich)
item.description: License: closed Type: model GPT-2 trained on leaked passwords

item.title: DIDACT (Google DeepMind)
item.description: License: closed Type: model Iterative coding model trained on Google's monorepo. Jacob: https://twitter.com/jacobaustin132/status/1663972128176128002

item.title: LTM-1 (Magic)
item.description: License: closed Type: model Context window=5M

item.title: GPT-4 MathMix (OpenAI)
item.description: Parameters: 1760B License: closed Type: model Unreleased, includes step by step research

item.title: PandaGPT (Cambridge/Tencent)
item.description: Parameters: 13B License: open Type: model Proto-AGI. 6 modalities (text, image/video, audio, depth, thermal, and IMU/accelerometer/gyroscope/compass). Based on Vicuna.

item.title: Falcon (TII)
item.description: Parameters: 40B License: open Type: model Abu Dhabi

item.title: 202305-refact2b-mqa-lion (Refact)
item.description: Parameters: 1.6B License: partial Type: model LiON vs Adam, code, RedPajama+The Stack

item.title: Guanaco (UW)
item.description: Parameters: 65B License: open Type: model LLaMA-65B via QLoRA

item.title: LIMA (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 65B License: closed Type: model LLaMA-65B with nearly no fine-tuning, no RLHF

item.title: Formosa (FFM) (Asus/TWS)
item.description: Parameters: 176B License: partial Type: model BLOOMZ finetune? Chinese, Taiwan's first LLM. Subscription hardware: https://archive.md/cVdJt

item.title: CodeT5+ (Salesforce)
item.description: Parameters: 16B License: open Type: model InstructCodeT5+ 16B sets new SoTA results of 35.0% pass@1 and 54.5% pass@10 against other open code LLMs, even surpassing the closed-source OpenAI code-cushman-001'

item.title: PaLM 2 (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 340B License: open Type: model “What we found in our work is that it’s not really the sort of size of model — that the larger is not always better,” Deepmind VP Zoubin Ghahramani said in a press briefing ahead of today’s announcement. “That’s why we’ve provided a family of models of different sizes. We think that actually parameter count is not really a useful way of thinking about the capabilities of models and capabilities are really to be judged by people using the models and finding out whether they’re useful in the tests that they try to achieve with these models.”

item.title: StarCoder (HF/ServiceNow)
item.description: Parameters: 15.5B License: open Type: model

item.title: MPT (MosaicML)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model Llongboi' -Apache 2.0 license suitable for commercial use. -Base 7B LLM trained on 1T tokens outperforms LLaMA and GPT3. -64K+ context length. -$200k to train from scratch.

item.title: Pi (Inflection AI)
item.description: Parameters: 60B License: open Type: model No indication of params/tokens. Devs from DeepMind.

item.title: GPT-2B-001 (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: 2B License: open Type: model No paper yet

item.title: Titan (Amazon)
item.description: Parameters: 200B License: open Type: model No official information at all. 2nd hand via Jack Clark: https://importai.substack.com/p/import-ai-365-wmd-benchmark-amazon '$65m training run. Specifically, they trained a 200B dense model on 4T tokens of data across 13,760 NVIDIA A100 chips (using 1,720 P4d nodes). It took 48 days to train.'

item.title: WizardLM (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model LLaMA 7B self-instructed fine-tune.

item.title: MPT (MosaicML)
item.description: Parameters: 1.3B License: open Type: model More 1B models coming with different datasets. Many more.

item.title: StableLM (Stability AI)
item.description: Parameters: 65B License: open Type: model contains 1.5 trillion tokens, roughly 3x the size of The Pile. These models will be trained on up to 1.5 trillion tokens. The context length for these models is 4096 tokens.

item.title: Dolly 2.0 (Databricks)
item.description: Parameters: 12B License: open Type: model Fine-tuned Pythia 12B

item.title: Pythia (EleutherAI)
item.description: Parameters: 12B License: open Type: model

item.title: Koala-13B (Berkeley)
item.description: Parameters: 13B License: open Type: model LLaMA base. Academic licence only.

item.title: C1.2 (Character.ai)
item.description: Parameters: 20B License: open Type: model No details released.

item.title: BloombergGPT (Bloomberg)
item.description: Parameters: 50B License: closed Type: model Video: https://youtu.be/m2Scj2SO85Y Underperforms GPT-3, based on BLOOM. Tokens: 'We select a model size motivated by Hoffmann et al. (2022) and train a 50 billion parameter model on 569 billion tokens from our corpus of over 700 billion tokens to produce a model that is competitive with larger models.'

item.title: OpenFlamingo-9B (LAION)
item.description: Parameters: 8.3B License: open Type: model Uses LLaMA-7B. Demo: https://7164d2142d11.ngrok.app/

item.title: GPT4All-LoRa (Nomic)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model chatbot trained on ~800k GPT-3.5-Turbo Generations based on LLaMa

item.title: Cerebras-GPT (Cerebras)
item.description: Parameters: 13B License: open Type: model 20:1 tokens to parameters as per https://lifearchitect.ai/chinchilla/

item.title: PanGu-Sigma (Huawei)
item.description: Parameters: 1085B License: closed Type: model Sparse. 1.085T parameters named PanGu-Σ.

item.title: CoLT5 (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 5.2B License: closed Type: model up to 64k context window [48k words or about 96 pages -Alan]

item.title: Med-PaLM 2 (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 340B License: closed Type: model Recently, our next iteration, Med-PaLM 2, consistently performed at an “expert” doctor level on medical exam questions, scoring 85%. This is an 18% improvement from Med-PaLM’s previous performance and far surpasses similar AI models.

item.title: GPT-4 Classic (gpt-4-0314 & gpt-4-0613, non-Turbo) (OpenAI)
item.description: Parameters: 1760B License: open Type: model Original MMLU=86.4. MMLU=90.1 with prompting. Proto-AGI. 1.76T parameters MoE.

item.title: Alpaca (Stanford)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model Stanford Alpaca: An Instruction-following LLaMA model'

item.title: Jurassic-2 (AI21)
item.description: Parameters: 178B License: open Type: model

item.title: GPT-NeoX-Chat-Base-20B (Together)
item.description: Parameters: 20B License: open Type: model instruction-tuned 20 billion parameter language model, a 6 billion parameter moderation model, and an extensible retrieval system for including up-to-date responses from custom repositories. It was trained on the OIG-43M training dataset, which was a collaboration between Together, LAION, and Ontocord.ai. '

item.title: Kosmos-1 (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 1.6B License: closed Type: model Proto-AGI. Multimodal large language model (MLLM). Raven’s Progressive Matrices as real images, not digits as in testing of text-davinci-003 at https://lifearchitect.ai/ravens/

item.title: LLaMA-65B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 65B License: open Type: model Researchers only, noncommercial only. 'LLaMA-65B is competitive with the best models, Chinchilla70B and PaLM-540B.'

item.title: MOSS (Fudan University)
item.description: Parameters: 16B License: open Type: model Major bandwidth issues: https://www.reuters.com/technology/china-fudan-university-team-apologises-after-chatgpt-style-platform-crashes-2023-02-21/

item.title: Palmyra (Writer)
item.description: Parameters: 20B License: open Type: model Only up to 5B available open-source 'trained on over 300 billion tokens of text data, and the size of the resulting model is over 20 billion parameters. ' https://writer.com/product/cowrite/

item.title: Luminous Supreme Control (Aleph Alpha)
item.description: Parameters: 70B License: open Type: model ‘Control’ means instruction tuned

item.title: Toolformer+Atlas 11B+NLLB 54B (Meta AI)
item.description: Parameters: 6.7B License: closed Type: model Based on GPT-J 6.7B + access to other models via API

item.title: Multimodal-CoT (Amazon)
item.description: Parameters: 0.738B License: open Type: model Models <1B with vision CoT

item.title: FLAME (Microsoft)
item.description: Parameters: 0.06B License: closed Type: model T5 for Excel formulas, very small 60M params, "We start from a dataset of 927M formulas" estimate 10x multiplier for 9B tokens
